title: Kinetica
description: Kinetica is a peaceful modpack built around Create, combining light tech, decoration, and immersive world enhancements. No magic, no combat – just creative engineering, beautiful builds, and cozy exploration.
body:
![Modpack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/808f4993b279c2c180afe48952f6f17092fadf25.png)

⚙️ **Welcome to Kinetica!**
Looking for a calm and creative adventure? **Kinetica** is a peaceful modpack built around the magic of *Create*, exploration, and stunning world generation. Wander through breathtaking landscapes, discover hidden structures, and build your dream base — all at your own pace.

Want some company? Choose a new loyal companion like a **ferret, otter, or red panda** to follow you on your journey through vibrant and mysterious biomes!

Love decorating? 🪑 There’s plenty of stylish furniture to help you create a cozy home wherever you go.

📸 Scroll down to see some in-game screenshots and get a glimpse of the beauty that awaits!

---

**🏔️ Stunning terrain generation**
![A forest like you’d see in Canada. Shows the new terrain generation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/99ffbae338d61e49b5379c10564b2f0463589e56.png)
![An oasis in a desert, showing the new terrain generation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51ef9ae06864ac22d613a5c9ad42616e3f107aa3.png)

**🏠 Discover unique structures**
![A hut in the desert](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eed8f2ea2a2d41552df3a9ebbacd2ce33a2384ff.png)
![Shows a new village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a548fba287e9eab1fb80fd9b3c1962a19acf81f8_0.webp)

**🔥 Adorable companions**
![A red panda sleeping (companion mod)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cf00c69a095500a642f3a6168000c2a77cadc81.png)
![An otter from the companions mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a3806c59a03cd640070283fe7e33187539430ef.png)
![A cute ferret as a companion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d4b1b00c5a179b652eb347f870bd855c2f076079.png)

---

If this sounds like your kind of adventure – then what are you waiting for?
I hope you enjoy every step of the way!

---
